mapper.select: SELECT mapping.* , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm , fileInfo.FILE_SIZE , fileInfo.FILE_NO , fileInfo.FILE_NM , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM , fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM , FN_GET_CD_NM('productionObjectType', 'DOC', #{sessionLang}) AS objectTypeNm , 'DOC' objectType FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = fileInfo.REQUEST_NO AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT mapping.* , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm , fileInfo.FILE_SIZE , fileInfo.FILE_NO , fileInfo.FILE_NM , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM , fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM , FN_GET_CD_NM('productionObjectType', 'SW', #{sessionLang}) AS objectTypeNm , 'SW' objectType FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = fileInfo.REQUEST_NO AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
